senses.definition_en: na visitari, mfwano ni tse-tse-tse, pi-pi-pi, do-do-do na ganasomeka
senses.definition_dg: Maneno ganagosomeka mara tahu, dza sauti zinazohumirwa kuonyesa hali.

examples.dg: Maneno ga Chidigo gachiandikpwa kpwa njira za pekee.
examples.en: Digo words are written in special ways.
examples.sw: Maneno ya Kidigo huandikwa kwa njia za pekee.

equivalents_en: the outer covering or skin of a fruit

senses.definition_en: the outer covering or skin of a fruit
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya kondze ya tunda, ganda ra tunda.

examples.dg: Gandula gada ra ndizi kabla ya kurya.
examples.en: Peel the skin of the banana before eating.
examples.sw: Bamba ganda la ndizi kabla ya kula.

equivalents_sw: temporary repair or healing which does not really

senses.definition_sw: temporary repair or healing which does not really
senses.definition_dg: Kudzengisha chitu kpwa muda mfupi ela si kpwa njira ya kudumu.

examples.dg: Gadza-gadza hino taiisha, ni ya muda bahi.
examples.en: This quick-fix won't last, it's only temporary.
examples.sw: Marekebisho haya ya muda si ya kudumu.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kurekebisha au kuagua ambako hakuondoi shida iliyoko

examples.dg: Proverb: Gadza-gadza ya mganga yalaza mkpwongo na tamaa
examples.en: The traditional healer's 'fix' makes the sick person lie with hope

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa mara moja, bila kutarajiya.

examples.dg: Mvula ikaanya gafula bila ya ishara.
examples.en: The rain fell suddenly without warning.
examples.sw: Mvua ilinyesha ghafula bila ishara.

equivalents_en: squeeze something into a small space

senses.definition_en: to squeeze something into a small space
senses.definition_dg: Kushindilia chitu ndani ya phatu phaidide.

examples.dg: Wagagamiza nguo nyinji ndani ya sanduku ndide.
examples.en: He squeezed many clothes into a small box.
examples.sw: Alishindilia nguo nyingi ndani ya sanduku ndogo.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeolaga atu ama kuhendza ghasia.

examples.dg: Gaidi akagwirwa ni porisi.
examples.en: The murderer was caught by the police.
examples.sw: Gaidi alikamatwa na polisi.

senses.definition_en: to roll around, to toss, to squirm (for example in pain)
senses.definition_dg: Kuzunguka-zunguka photsi kpwa maumivu ama wasiwasi.

examples.dg: Mkpwongo akagalagala chitandani kpwa maumivu.
examples.en: The patient tossed around in bed from pain.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa aligaagaa kitandani kwa maumivu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na bei kulu, kukala si rahisi kuphaha.

examples.dg: Vitu vyosi ni gali rero hiku.
examples.en: Everything is expensive these days.
examples.sw: Vitu vyote ni ghali siku hizi.

senses.definition_en: to turn, to turn into, to change
senses.definition_dg: Kubadilika, kukala chitu chanjina, kugeuka.

examples.dg: Hali ya hewa ikagaluka kula joto hadi baridi.
examples.en: The weather changed from hot to cold.
examples.sw: Hali ya hewa iligeuka kutoka joto hadi baridi.

senses.definition_en: to change something, to turn something
senses.definition_dg: Kuhendza chitu chikale chanjina, kubadilisha.

examples.dg: Galuza maneno gano kula Chiingereza kuphiya Chidigo.
examples.en: Change these words from English to Digo.
examples.sw: Geuza maneno haya kutoka Kiingereza kwenda Kidigo.

sub_entries.definition_en: ndani to turn something inside out

senses.definition_dg: Chitu kugomezana na chitu chanjina, kunika.

examples.dg: Ugali ukagama ndani ya sufuriya.
examples.en: The ugali stuck inside the pot.
examples.sw: Ugali ulisakama ndani ya sufuria.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeterya kupatanisha atu airi ama zaidi.

examples.dg: Gambera waaterya atu airi aphatane.
examples.en: The mediator helped the two people reconcile.
examples.sw: Mshenga aliwasaidia watu wawili wapatane.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kunata chinahumirwa kugomeza vitu phamwenga.

examples.dg: Humira gamu kugomeza karatasi hizi.
examples.en: Use glue to stick these papers together.
examples.sw: Tumia gamu kubandika karatasi hizi.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari ya mia moja, 100, neno ra asili ra Chidigo.

examples.dg: Gana mwenga ra atu akakpwedza kpwa sherehe.
examples.en: One hundred people came to the celebration.
examples.sw: Watu mia moja walikuja kwenye sherehe.

examples.dg: Ganda ikabigwa usiku wa sherehe.
examples.en: The drum was beaten on the night of the celebration.

senses.definition_dg: Kuinama kpwa upande mmwenga, kutegemea chitu.

examples.en: The elder leaned against the wall because he was tired.
examples.sw: Mzee alitegemea ukuta kwa sababu alikuwa amechoka.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chirichoganda ama chirichogomana, kama gande ra milatso.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyama wa kuruka ariye na rangi nyiru na nyekundu shingoni.

examples.en: The barbet lives in the tree eating fruits.

senses.definition_dg: Udongo unaonyata kama tope, udongo mzito.

examples.en: Peel the banana skin before eating it.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya sehemu ya mwiri kukala tayasikia chitu, kuwa fwa.

examples.dg: Kabla ya kupasuliwa wapigbwa sindano tahu za gandzi
examples.en: Before the operation he was given three anaesthetic injections

senses.definition_en: deserted village or town, ruin, desolation, ghost town
senses.definition_dg: Mudzi ama mji uriorichwа ni atu, phatu penye magofu.

examples.dg: Gandzo ra mji hura rinaonekana tsakani.
examples.en: The ruins of that town can be seen in the forest.
examples.sw: Magofu ya mji ule yanaonekana msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Na vitu vyanjina vya aina hiyo, na kadhalika.

examples.dg: Hwagula mchele, munyu, ganjinage.
examples.en: We bought rice, salt, etcetera.
examples.sw: Tulinunua mchele, chumvi, na kadhalika.

senses.definition_en: to divide, to share, to sort
senses.definition_dg: Kutenga chitu kpwa makundi, kuganya kpwa usawa.

examples.en: Divide that food among all the people.
examples.sw: Gawanya chakula hicho kwa watu wote.

senses.definition_en: to give a share, to distribute, to divide among people
senses.definition_dg: Kupha chila mutu sehemu yache ya chitu.

examples.dg: Mayo waganyira ana chakurya kpwa usawa.
examples.en: Mother distributed food to the children equally.
examples.sw: Mama aligawia watoto chakula kwa usawa.

senses.definition_dg: Pesa ambayo inahumirwa kpwa kuhenda chitu, bei ya kazi.

examples.dg: Garama za kudzenga nyumba ni kulu sana.
examples.en: The costs of building a house are very high.
examples.sw: Gharama za kujenga nyumba ni kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kunyendekera ambacho china magurudumu na injini.

examples.dg: Baba wagula gari riphya.
examples.en: Father bought a new car.
examples.sw: Baba alinunua gari jipya.

senses.definition_dg: Gari kulu rinaphiya dzulu ya reli kpwa mosi.

examples.en: The train goes from Mombasa to Nairobi.
examples.sw: Gari la moshi linakwenda kutoka Mombasa kwenda Nairobi.

senses.definition_en: to cost, to charge, to have value
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na bei fulani, kuhendza mutu ariphire.

examples.dg: Chitabu chakugarimu shilingi ngaphi?
examples.en: How much did the book cost you?
examples.sw: Kitabu kinaugharimu shilingi ngapi?

equivalents_en: vinono. 3.        Sauti zinazovutwa Aina tahu za sauti zinazovutwa nkuandikpwa kpwa kuhumira alama á na ó: 1.   Kutafautisha neno vivi sambi naphiya ambapho sauti taivutwa na neno náphiya kuonyesa ni hendo rohendeka dzana ama siku zotsupa

senses.definition_en: vinono. 3.        Sauti zinazovutwa Aina tahu za sauti zinazovutwa nkuandikpwa kpwa kuhumira alama á na ó: 1.   Kutafautisha neno vivi sambi naphiya ambapho sauti taivutwa na neno náphiya kuonyesa ni hendo rohendeka dzana ama siku zotsupa, ambayo sautiye inavutwa kuonyesa hendo renye rahendeka chitambo. 2.   Kutafautisha neno lola ya matso na lóla ya kuphaha mchetu. 3.   Kutafautisha neno mwanao (mwana wa kumvyala) na mwanáo (nduguye) lakini ichikala tayeeleweka neno mwenehu nkuhumika badala ya neno mwanáo. 4.        Maneno gaandikpwago kpwa ure na ufupi Kuna maneno ganjina ambago nkufupishwa kpwa mfwano nina ambaro si mara

senses.definition_dg: Karatasi yenye habari ambazo zinauzwa chila siku ama chila wiki.

senses.definition_dg: Basikili inayohendwa kpwa mihi ni ana, ya kuchezera.

examples.en: The children make wooden bicycles for playing.

senses.definition_dg: Kugaluza chitu, kupinda chitu uphande wanjina.

examples.en: Turn the car to the left side.

examples.dg: Wageruza na kurudi kaya haraka.

examples.en: The woman tried to escape from the house

examples.en: The darkness was great last night.
examples.sw: Giza lilikuwa kubwa usiku wa jana.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa mambo ga ngeli ya sita, dza 'cho' kpwa ngeli yanjina.

examples.dg: Mambo go gosi gananisononeza.
examples.en: All those matters sadden me.
examples.sw: Mambo yote hayo yananisikitisha.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kulalira ambacho chinaikpwa dzulu ya chitanda.

examples.en: Buy a new mattress for our bed.

examples.dg: Godza hipha, n'ndauya sambi.
examples.en: Wait here, I will come back soon.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala phatu huchiphiya kala mutu fulani ama chitu fulani.

examples.en: I am waiting for the bus since morning.

examples.sw: Ng'ombe jike yule ana maziwa mengi.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya maneno na kanwa, kunena.

examples.dg: Gomba pole pole ili nikuelewe.
examples.en: Speak slowly so that I understand you.

senses.definition_en: to speak sharply to someone, to argue
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba na mutu kpwa ukali, kugomezana.

examples.en: Gonda is a traditional Digo dance.

examples.en: Take that tree branch for lighting the fire.

examples.sw: Jongoo na miguu yake.

examples.sw: Tumia nyundo kupiga msumari ndani ya mbao.

senses.definition_dg: Ganda ra kondze ra muhi, gome.

examples.dg: Gopha ra muhi huno ni ngumu sana.
examples.en: The bark of this tree is very hard.
examples.sw: Gome la mti huu ni gumu sana.

equivalents_en: a pair of kangas (bright cloths worn by women

senses.definition_en: a pair of kangas (bright cloths worn by women, usually sold in pairs)
senses.definition_dg: Kanga mbiri zinazoguliwa phamwenga, zinazovwalwa ni achetu.

examples.en: Mother was bought a nice pair of kangas with yellow colors.

senses.definition_sw: sauti anayotoa mtu anapokaribia kufa au kulia
senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya kuota koo inayohendwa ni mutu anayeandza kufwa ama kurira.

examples.dg: Ana gore-gore avi anataka kurira
examples.en: He is choking as if he is about to cry
examples.sw: Ana sauti ya kuchokoza koo kama anataka kulia.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama mkpwulu wa tsakani anayefwanana na mutu, sokwe mtu.

examples.dg: Gorila ni nyama mkpwulu kuriko nyani osi.

examples.sw: Gorila ni sokwe mkubwa kuliko wote.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya dzulu ya nyumba yenye ghorofa.

examples.dg: Shuwa ana gorofa ya nyumba ya dzulu.
examples.en: The office is on the upper floor.
examples.sw: Ofisi iko ghorofa ya juu.

senses.definition_en: to be close to death, to be at death's door
senses.definition_dg: Kukala phephi na kufwa, kukala mahututi.

examples.dg: Mkpwongo akagoromezwa, phahi atu akakpwedza kumtembelera.
examples.en: The patient was at death's door, so people came to visit him.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa alikuwa mahututi, kwa hivyo watu walikuja kumtembelea.

senses.definition_en: greater plated lizard, common in caves (Gerrhosaurus major major)
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mjusi mkpwulu anayeishi mapangoni.

examples.dg: Goromwe ni mjusi mkpwulu anayeishi mapangoni.
examples.en: The plated lizard is a large lizard that lives in caves.
examples.sw: Goromwe ni mjusi mkubwa anayeishi mapangoni.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyosha chitu, kugolosa.

examples.dg: Tunagorosa maguru
examples.en: We are stretching our legs (taking a walk)
examples.sw: Tunanyosha miguu kwa kupumzika.

senses.definition_en: to hit, to knock, to tap
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga chitu kpwa mkpwono ama fimbo.

examples.dg: Usigote mulango kpwa nguvu za hizo.
examples.en: Don't knock on the door that hard.
examples.sw: Usipige mlango kwa nguvu hizo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuenea phatu phosi, kutapakaa.

examples.dg: Habari ikagota mudzi wosi.
examples.en: The news spread throughout the whole village.
examples.sw: Habari ilienea kijiji kizima.

senses.definition_dg: Kueneza chitu phatu phosi.

examples.dg: Phahali phosi akaphagoteza rangi
examples.en: He has spread paint everywhere
examples.sw: Walieneza rangi kila mahali.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya nyuma ya phivi.

examples.dg: Goyo yangu inaniuma kpwa mana nkakala muda mure.
examples.en: The back of my knee hurts because I sat for a long time.
examples.sw: Nyuma ya goti yangu inauma kwa sababu nilikaa muda mrefu.

equivalents_en: way in which water overflows steadily

senses.definition_en: way in which water overflows steadily
senses.definition_dg: Njira ambayo madzi ganamwagika kpwa wingi.

examples.dg: Madzi ga muho ganamwagika gubu-gubu
examples.en: The river water is overflowing steadily
examples.sw: Maji ya mto yanamwagika kwa wingi.

equivalents_en: red-eyed dove. This bird is known as the saa bird

senses.definition_en: red-eyed dove. This bird is known as the saa bird, calling the time, gugu, gugu-jinga at 4 am, 12 noon and 4 pm. (Streptopelia semitorquata)
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya njiwa anayeihwa kpwa saa, ana matso matswekune.

examples.dg: Gugu nkuiha ligundzu na muhala kuonyesa wakati.
examples.en: The red-eyed dove calls in the morning and afternoon to tell the time.
examples.sw: Njiwa anayeitwa huita asubuhi na mchana kuonyesha wakati.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye chetse na mimea ya madzini.

examples.dg: Gugu rinapha madzi kpwa wakati wa kuhama.
examples.en: The swamp provides water during the dry season.
examples.sw: Gugu linatoa maji wakati wa kiangazi.

equivalents_en: smell of a coconut tree or some other tree
equivalents_sw: harufu ya mnazi ama miti mingine

senses.definition_en: smell of a coconut tree or some other tree
senses.definition_sw: harufu ya mnazi ama miti mingine
senses.definition_dg: Harufu ya mnazi ama mihi yanjina.

examples.dg: Gugumo wa mnazi unanukira vinono.
examples.en: The smell of the coconut tree is pleasant.
examples.sw: Harufu ya mnazi ina harufu nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kurya chitu kigumu kpwa kuchikonya-konya na meno, kama muhindi.

examples.dg: Mwana nkuguguna muhindi kpwa menoge.
examples.en: The child is gnawing at a maize cob with his teeth.
examples.sw: Mtoto anakuguguna mahindi kwa meno yake.

senses.definition_dg: Chirugu cha muhindi ambacho nafaka zikatuluka.

examples.dg: Guguta za muhindi zinahumirwa kuasira moho.
examples.en: Empty maize cobs are used for lighting fires.
examples.sw: Guguta za mahindi zinatumika kuwashia moto.

equivalents_en: cob of maize with the grains removed

senses.definition_en: cob of maize with the grains removed
senses.definition_dg: Chirugu cha muhindi ambacho nafaka zikatuluka.

examples.dg: Guguta za muhindi zinahumirwa kuasira moho.
examples.en: Empty maize cobs are used for lighting fires.
examples.sw: Guguta za mahindi zinatumika kuwashia moto.

equivalents_en: feel your heart beating very fast because of fear or bad news

senses.definition_en: to feel your heart beating very fast because of fear or bad news
senses.definition_dg: Kusikira moyo ukupiga kpwa haraka sana kpwa sababu ya wasiwasi.

examples.dg: Moyo wangu ukaguguta niriphoona habari mbii.
examples.en: My heart beat fast when I heard the bad news.
examples.sw: Moyo wangu ulipiga kwa haraka niliposikia habari mbaya.

senses.definition_dg: Kupha pesa kpwa kuphaha chitu, kununua.

examples.dg: Naphiya sokoni kugula mboga.
examples.en: I am going to the market to buy vegetables.
examples.sw: Naenda sokoni kununua mboga.

equivalents_sw: usually refers to the square marked toad (Bufa regularis); chura

senses.definition_sw: usually refers to the square marked toad (Bufa regularis); chura
senses.definition_dg: Nyama mdide anayeishi madzini na kuruka kpwa maguluge.

examples.dg: Gula anarira usiku kpwa sauti kulu.
examples.en: The frog croaks loudly at night.
examples.sw: Chura analia usiku kwa sauti kubwa.

senses.definition_en: leg, including the foot (of a person)
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri ya mutu kula phivini hadi maguluni, kpwa kunyendekera.

examples.dg: Gulu rangu rinauma kpwa mana nkatsapa sana.
examples.en: My leg hurts because I walked a lot.
examples.sw: Mguu wangu unauma kwa sababu nilitembea sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala si kubirike, kukala ngumu kuvundza ama kuelewa.

examples.dg: Chizungu ni luga ngumu; kudzifundza Chizungu ni vigumu
examples.en: English is a difficult language; to learn English is hard
examples.sw: Kiingereza ni lugha ngumu; kujifunza Kiingereza ni vigumu.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka ukiinama uphande mmwenga kpwa sababu ya kuumwa mgulu.

examples.dg: Mzehe nkugumwira kpwa mana akaunjika mgulu.
examples.en: The elder limps because he broke his leg.
examples.sw: Mzee anachechemea kwa sababu alivunjika mguu.

equivalents_en: ram's horn blown like trumpet to summon people

senses.definition_en: ram's horn blown like trumpet to summon people
senses.definition_dg: Pembe ya turume inayopulizwa kama tarumbeta kpwa kuiha atu.

examples.dg: Proverb: Gunda ra mnyonje ni kola
examples.en: A weak person's horn is a snail shell (it is ineffective)
examples.sw: Pembe ya mnyonge ni kikohozi.

senses.definition_dg: Muhi mdide wa tsakani wenye miiba.

examples.dg: Jihadhari na gunga, miibaye ni kali.
examples.en: Be careful of the thorny bush, its thorns are sharp.
examples.sw: Jihadhari na mti wenye miba, miba yake ni kali.

examples.dg: Mchetu gungu asiye na mroromi wala msada wowosi nkumuadamira Mlungu bahi
examples.en: A widow who has no-one to look after her nor any help whatsoever depends on God alone

equivalents_en: leg of a piece of furniture

senses.definition_en: leg of a piece of furniture
senses.definition_dg: Mgulu wa samani ama meza ama chitanda.

examples.dg: Gunguhi wa meza ukavundzika.
examples.en: The leg of the table broke.
examples.sw: Mguu wa meza ulivunjika.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi kulu ra atu, nyama, ama vitu.

examples.dg: Guphuphu ya ndama ikala mundani.
examples.en: A herd of calves was in the field.
examples.sw: Kundi la ndama lilikuwa shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Kununua chitu kpwa kupha pesa.

examples.dg: Naphiya dukani kugura chumvi.
examples.en: I am going to the shop to buy salt.
examples.sw: Naenda dukani kununua chumvi.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya hewa kukala na uvungo na mawingu madide-madide.

examples.dg: Guro rinaonekana kula mbali ligundzu hiri.
examples.en: Mist can be seen from far this morning.
examples.sw: Ukungu unaonekana kutoka mbali asubuhi hii.

equivalents_en: path made by animals e.g. cattle

senses.definition_en: path made by animals e.g. cattle
senses.definition_sw: njia ya wanyama, kwa mfano ng'ombe
senses.definition_dg: Njira ya mifugo, kama ng'ombe, tsakani.

examples.dg: Gurufu ya ng'ombe inaonekana tsakani.
examples.en: The cattle path is visible in the bush.
examples.sw: Njia ya ng'ombe inaonekana porini.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya kundi ra nyenyezi mlunguni.

examples.dg: Gurufu inaonekana usiku mlunguni.
examples.en: The star constellation is visible in the sky at night.
examples.sw: Kundi la nyota linaonekana usiku angani.

senses.definition_dg: Kukokota chitu photsi kpwa kukivuta.

examples.dg: Guruta muhi hura hadi hipha.
examples.en: Drag that log to here.
examples.sw: Kokota mti ule hadi hapa.

senses.definition_dg: Nguo nyiru ya pamba inayovwalwa ni achetu.

examples.dg: Binti anavwala gushe yache ya kaniki.
examples.en: The girl is wearing her black cotton cloth.
examples.sw: Binti amevaa kaniki yake.

senses.definition_dg: Ukongo wa milatso kukosa nguvu, safura.

examples.dg: Mwana ana guta, anahitaji dawa na chakurya chinono.
examples.en: The child has anaemia, he needs medicine and good food.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana safura, anahitaji dawa na chakula kizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kushika chitu kpwa mkpwono, kugusa.

examples.dg: Usigute chitu hicho, ni cha moho.
examples.en: Don't touch that thing, it's hot.
examples.sw: Usiguse kitu hicho, ni cha moto.

senses.definition_dg: Kupendeza, kukala chinono.

examples.dg: Proverb: Taganiguta
examples.en: It does not please me
examples.sw: Habari hiyo hainipendezi.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka ukiinama uphande mmwenga, kuchechemea.

examples.dg: Mzehe nkugutsira kpwa sababu ya mgulu wake.
examples.en: The elder limps because of his leg.
examples.sw: Mzee anachechemea kwa sababu ya mguu wake.

senses.definition_en: to push, especially someone's head as a sign of disapproval
senses.definition_dg: Kusukuma mutu, hasa kumsukuma chitswani kpwa kuonyesa kutoridhika.

examples.dg: Usimugutsuule mwana chitswani.
examples.en: Don't push the child on the head.
examples.sw: Usimsukume mtoto kichwani.

equivalents_en: hama kusukuma kichwa cha mwingine kuonyesha kutoridhika ama kukasirika

senses.definition_en: hama kusukuma kichwa cha mwingine kuonyesha kutoridhika ama kukasirika
senses.definition_dg: Kusukuma chitswa cha mutu kpwa mkpwono kuonyesa kukala ukamtsukirirwa au kutoridhika.

examples.dg: Mayo wakamgutsunyula mwanawe kpwa sababu waona ana makosa.
examples.en: The mother pushed the child's head to show disapproval.
examples.sw: Mama alimsukumia mtoto kichwa kuonyesha kutoridhika.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya muhi iriyosala bada ya kutsekpwa.

examples.dg: Gutu ra muhi rimesala bada ya muhi kutsekpwa.
examples.en: The tree stump remained after the tree was cut.
examples.sw: Gutu la mti limesalia baada ya mti kukatwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa ganda ra chitu, kubambua.

examples.dg: Manga achiguwiwa na kuanikpwa achiuma anakala makopa
examples.en: Cassava, when peeled and dried is called "makopa"
examples.sw: Muhogo ukibamuliwa na kuanikwa ukikauka unakuwa makopa.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mboga ya maharage yenye umbo dide na ure.

examples.dg: Guwaro ni mboga nono ya kuphikira.
examples.en: French beans are good vegetables for cooking.
examples.sw: Guaro ni mboga nzuri ya kupikia.

senses.definition_dg: Kupha mutu bidhaa na kuphaha pesa, kuuza.

examples.dg: Nkuguza samaki sokoni chila siku.
examples.en: She sells fish at the market every day.
examples.sw: Anauza samaki sokoni kila siku.
